snippets.comment: Professor Trinh has been the best math professor I've ever had. He is very intentional about making sure his students understand the "why" behind statistical calculations. If you attend the classes and pay attention you can, as I did, receive a A+. This was a great course, but you must do the homewo
I would recommend him to others.

Professor Trinh provides everything you need to succeed in this class. He has pre-made detailed lecture notes that give you all the information you need. If you pay attention in class and do all the homework you will have no problem passing! I would definitely take him again.
